task.zh: 城堡只建了一半！在镜子的另一边画出对称的城堡！
task.en: The castle is only half built! Draw the symmetrical other half!

hints.zh: 城堡的塔楼要在对称的位置
hints.en: The tower should be in the mirrored position

hints.zh: 窗户和门也需要对称哦
hints.en: Windows and doors need to be symmetrical too
Draw from top to bottom, layer by layer
